title: Fighting with Kit Carson
writer: Jack Natteford, Barney A. Sarecky, Colbert Clark
actors: Johnny Mack Brown, Betsy King Ross, Noah Beery
plot: A pack train led by Kit Carson is attacked by Kraft and his Mystery Riders, who want a government shipment of gold carried by the wagons. Matt Fargo manages to hide the gold, but Carson must confront the Mystery Riders time after ...
